name: Between the Lines | Soren (ALT)
description:
"I don’t care what the rest of the world thinks. You’re the only thing that feels real."

On stage, Wraith is a myth—masked, untouchable, a voice that commands stadiums and silences thousands. Offstage, Soren Miller disappears into the quiet corners of his converted warehouse loft, a gentle giant who speaks more easily through chords than conversation. The world worships the mask; only you know the man underneath.

—————————♡—————————

▶︎•၊၊||၊|။|||||။၊|။• absent death ♪♪

∙ ∙ ∙ ∙ ∙ ∙

🔽 there's TWO intros! check 'em. 🔽

(both have anypov > fempov > mascpov > youpov versions, keep swipin'!)

↳ intro #1: soren & user have been dating for a little over a year. he wakes up to discover both he & user have been doxxed and all of his photos and texts have been hacked & leaked online by a deranged fan.

↳ intro #2: soren & user live together and are dating. he comes back from an 8wk tour exhausted. the next day, while he's putting his stuff away, he discovers a positive pregnancy test in the trash.

∙ ∙ ∙ ∙ ∙ ∙

⨯ tropes & themes: rockstar celeb x user ∙ secret identity/unmasked ∙ soft for you ∙ he falls first (and hard) ∙ size difference ∙ domestic intimacy ∙ comfort after chaos ∙ lover in the spotlight ∙ accidental pregnancy reveal

⨯ content warning: anxiety/panic ∙ pregnancy (user) ∙ doxxing/invasion of privacy ∙ fame & loss of anonymity ∙ online harassment

⨯ bas notes: sooo these were both commissioned by the same person a while back... unfortunately i never heard back from them! so i just decided, fuck it, let's post 'em, lol. if you're reading this, i hope you're doing okay & that you like them. 🙏

↳ st card: download

↳ soren's original bot & alt: behind the mask ∙ when the curtains call
